creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
Although we do appreciate the attempt to help FreeBSD, we do have a system
where we do mass builds of ports and email the results to maintainers.
If these are ports you are using yourself and notice these breakages,
please feel free to continue sending PRs; however, if you are just going
through the list, be aware that you may be doing duplicate work.  Thanks.
